examples.label: Flowchart
examples.description: Decision flow with labeled branches.
examples.source:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Decision?}
  B -->|Yes| C[Do the thing]
  B -->|No| D[Skip it]
  C --> E[End]
  D --> E

examples.label: State diagram
examples.description: Lifecycle using Mermaid stateDiagram-v2 syntax.
examples.source:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Idle
  Idle --> Processing: start
  Processing --> Complete: done
  Processing --> Failed: error
  Failed --> Idle: retry
  Complete --> [*]

examples.label: Architecture
examples.description: Services, groups, icons, and routed connections.
examples.source:
architecture-beta
  group app(cloud)[Application]
  group data(database)[Data]
  service web(server)[Web App] in app
  service api(server)[API] in app
  service db(database)[Postgres] in data
  web:R --> L:api
  api:R --> L:db

examples.label: Sequence
examples.description: Request/response messages between participants.
examples.source:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant App
  participant API
  User->>App: Click export
  App->>API: Render SVG
  API-->>App: SVG string
  App-->>User: Download

examples.label: Class
examples.description: Classes with members and relationships.

examples.label: ER diagram
examples.description: Entities, attributes, keys, and cardinality markers.

examples.label: Timeline
examples.description: Chronological milestones with sections.
examples.source:
timeline
  title Product roadmap
  section Foundation
  2024 Q1 : Prototype
          : Parser coverage
  section Launch
  2024 Q2 : Public editor
          : SVG export

examples.label: User journey
examples.description: Scored user tasks grouped by section.
examples.source:
journey
  title Editor adoption
  section Try
    Open editor: 5: User
    Load example: 4: User, Developer
  section Share
    Copy URL: 5: User
    Export SVG: 4: Developer

examples.label: XY chart
examples.description: Bar and line series using xychart syntax.
examples.source:
xychart
  title "Weekly renders"
  x-axis [Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri]
  y-axis "Renders" 0 --> 100
  bar [25, 42, 58, 74, 88]
  line [18, 35, 52, 70, 95]

examples.label: Pie chart
examples.description: Proportional slices with values shown in the legend.
examples.source:
pie showData
  title Export requests by format
  "SVG" : 42
  "PNG" : 28
  "ASCII" : 18
  "Unicode" : 12

examples.label: Quadrant chart
examples.description: Two-axis priority map with labeled regions and points.
examples.source:
quadrantChart
  title Feature priorities
  x-axis Low impact --> High impact
  y-axis Low effort --> High effort
  quadrant-1 Plan carefully
  quadrant-2 Big bets
  quadrant-3 Defer
  quadrant-4 Quick wins
  SVG export: [0.78, 0.28]
  MCP setup: [0.62, 0.72]
  Theme polish: [0.35, 0.24]

examples.label: Gantt chart
examples.description: Sections, dependencies, status tags, and a milestone.
examples.source:
gantt
  title Release train
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
  excludes weekends
  section Build
    Completed task :done, des1, 2024-01-08, 2024-01-10
    Active task    :active, des2, 2024-01-11, 3d
    Future task    :des3, after des2, 5d
  section Ship
    Crit review    :crit, rev1, after des3, 2d
    Release        :milestone, m1, after rev1, 0d

examples.label: Styled flowchart
examples.description: Flowchart using semantic node, edge, text, and group roles.
examples.source:
flowchart TD
  subgraph product [Product Loop]
    A[Capture request] --> B{Ready?}
    B -->|yes| C[Ship]
    B -.->|needs work| D[Refine]
  end

examples.label: Styled state
examples.description: State diagram consuming the same flowchart/state role mapping.
examples.source:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Draft
  Draft --> Review: submit
  Review --> Draft: request changes
  Review --> Published: approve
  Published --> [*]

examples.label: Styled architecture
examples.description: Architecture services, groups, and connectors styled semantically.
examples.source:
architecture-beta
  group edge(cloud)[Edge Layer]
  group core(server)[Core Services]
  service web(server)[Web App] in edge
  service api(server)[API] in core
  service db(database)[Postgres] in core
  web:R --> L:api
  api:R --> L:db

examples.label: Styled sequence
examples.description: Participants use node style; messages use edge style.
examples.source:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User
  participant E as Editor
  participant R as Renderer
  U->>E: Change style role
  E->>R: render(source, options.style)
  R-->>E: SVG

examples.label: Styled class
examples.description: Class boxes and relationships through shared style roles.

examples.label: Styled ER
examples.description: ER entities and relationships inherit node/edge roles.

examples.label: Styled timeline
examples.description: Timeline periods and events styled as semantic cards/groups.
examples.source:
timeline
  title Fork Roadmap
  section Discover
  2024 Q2 : Audit forks
          : Extract small PRs
  section Ship
  2024 Q3 : Style roles
          : Live editor presets

examples.label: Styled journey
examples.description: Journey sections, task cards, and actor chips use role styles.
examples.source:
journey
  title Editor adoption
  section Try
    Open preset: 5: User
    Tune roles: 4: Designer, Developer
  section Share
    Copy URL: 5: User
    Export SVG: 4: Developer

examples.label: Styled xychart
examples.description: XY chart title, axes, grid, and series labels with shared roles.
examples.source:
xychart
  title "Styled Adoption"
  x-axis [Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri]
  y-axis "Renders" 0 --> 100
  bar [25, 42, 58, 74, 88]
  line [18, 35, 52, 70, 95]
